Gap #3 didn't exist.\n   - Read `agent-orchestrator.js` lines 1-45 (top) and 340-405 (`completeSubtask` end)\n   \n   **Edit 1**: In `assignSubtask()` (~line 268-276), added PLANNING→EXECUTING transition:\n   ```javascript\n   const isFirstAssignment = task.status === 'pending';\n   if (task.status === 'pending') {\n     task.status = 'in_progress';\n   }\n   // Phase 14: Transition FSM PLANNING → EXECUTING on first subtask assignment\n   if (isFirstAssignment && this.fsm.currentState === STATES.PLANNING) {\n     try {\n       this.fsm.transition(STATES.EXECUTING, {\n         action: 'FIRST_SUBTASK_ASSIGNED',\n         taskId,\n         agentRole: subtask.agent\n       });\n     } catch (fsmError) {\n       console.warn(`[FSM] Warning during EXECUTING transition:`, fsmError.message);\n     }\n   }\n   this.writeTask(task);\n   ```\n   \n   **Edit 2**: In `completeSubtask()`, added `finalizeTask()` call when all subtasks complete:\n   ```javascript\n   if (allComplete) {\n     const taskStatus = this.getTaskStatus(taskId);\n     this.slackNotifier.notifyTaskComplete(taskStatus);\n     await this.finalizeTask(taskId); // Phase 14: VERIFYING → CONSOLIDATING → IDLE\n   }\n   ```\n   \n   **Added `finalizeTask()` method** after `completeSubtask()`:\n   ```javascript\n   async finalizeTask(taskId) {\n     try {\n       if (this.fsm.currentState === STATES.VERIFYING) {\n         this.fsm.transition(STATES.CONSOLIDATING, { action: 'TASK_VERIFIED', taskId });\n         this.fsm.transition(STATES.IDLE, { action: 'TASK_CONSOLIDATED', taskId });\n       }\n     } catch (fsmError) {\n       console.warn(`[FSM] Warning during finalization:`, fsmError.message);\n     }\n   }\n   ```\n\n10. **Test Results**:\n    - `npm run test:phase-14`: 4/4 suites PASS (FSM, Vault Validator, MCP Whitelister, Regression)\n    - Full test output confirmed FSM cycle: `[FSM] ✓ Transitioned: VERIFYING → CONSOLIDATING` and `[FSM] ✓ Transitioned: CONSOLIDATING → IDLE`\n    - `npm test` (full suite): All tests passing, 0 failures\n\n11. **Commit**: `5b6a0b4` - \"feat: wire FSM full lifecycle into orchestrator (PLANNING→EXECUTING→VERIFYING→CONSOLIDATING→IDLE)\"\n    - 1 file changed, 30 insertions\n\n12. **Memory System**: The project uses a file-based memory system at `C:\\Users\\kryst\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-kryst-Code-App-Builder\\memory\\`. Primary Request and Intent:\n   The user opened a fresh session and asked \"What's next?\" — a broad question about what to work on in the App Builder project. After I presented four options (Wire FSM into production, Start Home Media Server, Pick a new project idea, Deepen the factory), the user explicitly chose **\"Wire FSM into production\"**: connecting the Phase 14 FSM state machine, MCP whitelister, and vault validator safety rails into the live orchestrator to close a known production gap.\n\n2. Key Technical Concepts:\n   - **FSM (Finite State Machine)**: `StateMachineEngine` class in `state-machine.js` with states IDLE→PLANNING→EXECUTING→VERIFYING→CONSOLIDATING→IDLE; strict state transition matrix; per-state permission gating\n   - **Agent Orchestrator**: `AgentOrchestrator` class coordinating multi-agent task execution with subtask dependency tracking, concurrency control via in-memory locks, and integration with Chroma, Slack, audit logging, and FSM\n   - **MCP Whitelister**: `MCPWhitelister` class detecting dangerous command patterns; already integrated into `mcp-authorization.js`\n   - **Vault Validator**: `VaultValidator` class enforcing YAML frontmatter on all Vault documents; already integrated into `chroma-ingest.js` with write-back already present\n   - **Phase 14 safety layer**: Three modules (FSM, whitelister, validator) built and tested in Phase 14; partially wired but missing two FSM state transitions\n   - **AI Software Factory**: 18-phase project framework; all 18 phases complete as of 2026-06-10\n   - **Chroma**: Vector database for semantic search over Vault documents; requires Docker\n   - **npm test suite**: 9 suites covering all phases; graceful degradation when Chroma/Docker not running\n\n3. Files and Code Sections:\n   - **`.claude/scripts/agent-orchestrator.js`** (primary modified file)\n     - 625-line orchestrator; `AgentOrchestrator` class\n     - **Already wired**: FSM initialized (line 30-32), IDLE→PLANNING in `createTask()` (lines 110-121), EXECUTING→VERIFYING in `completeSubtask()` (lines 305-319)\n     - **Edit 1**: Added PLANNING→EXECUTING transition in `assignSubtask()` after first subtask assignment:\n       ```javascript\n       const isFirstAssignment = task.status === 'pending';\n       if (task.status === 'pending') {\n         task.status = 'in_progress';\n       }\n       // Phase 14: Transition FSM PLANNING → EXECUTING on first subtask assignment\n       if (isFirstAssignment && this.fsm.currentState === STATES.PLANNING) {\n         try {\n           this.fsm.transition(STATES.EXECUTING, {\n             action: 'FIRST_SUBTASK_ASSIGNED',\n             taskId,\n             agentRole: subtask.agent\n           });\n         } catch (fsmError) {\n           console.warn(`[FSM] Warning during EXECUTING transition:`, fsmError.message);\n         }\n       }\n       this.writeTask(task);\n       ```\n     - **Edit 2**: Added `await this.finalizeTask(taskId)` call in `completeSubtask()` when `allComplete`:\n       ```javascript\n       if (allComplete) {\n         const taskStatus = this.getTaskStatus(taskId);\n         this.slackNotifier.notifyTaskComplete(taskStatus);\n         await this.finalizeTask(taskId); // Phase 14: VERIFYING → CONSOLIDATING → IDLE\n       }\n       ```\n     - **New method `finalizeTask()`** added after `completeSubtask()`:\n       ```javascript\n       async finalizeTask(taskId) {\n         try {\n           if (this.fsm.currentState === STATES.VERIFYING) {\n             this.fsm.transition(STATES.CONSOLIDATING, { action: 'TASK_VERIFIED', taskId });\n             this.fsm.transition(STATES.IDLE, { action: 'TASK_CONSOLIDATED', taskId });\n           }\n         } catch (fsmError) {\n           console.warn(`[FSM] Warning during finalization:`, fsmError.message);\n         }\n       }\n       ```\n   - **`.claude/scripts/vault-validator.js`** (read only, lines 251-315)\n     - `validateVault()` return structure examined; confirmed `fs.writeFileSync(filePath, validation.migratedContent, 'utf8')` already present at line 282 — Gap #3 from the plan didn't actually exist\n   - **`.claude/scripts/state-machine.js`**: `StateMachineEngine` with `transition()`, `isPermitted()`, `recordCrash()`, `getCrashRecoveryOptions()` methods; state persisted to `.claude/.fsm-state.json`; audit log at `.claude/mcp-audit/fsm-state.jsonl`\n   - **`.claude/scripts/mcp-whitelist.js`**: `MCPWhitelister` with `validateCommand()`, `checkDangerousPattern()`, `isWhitelistedCommand()` methods\n   - **`.claude/scripts/mcp-authorization.js`**: Already integrates whitelister via `checkCommand()`\n   - **`.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js`**: Already calls `validator.validateVault(true)` before processing; Errors and Fixes:\n   - **Plan incorrectly identified Gap #3** (vault validator write-back): The plan stated vault validator auto-migration didn't write back to disk. Reading `vault-validator.js:282` revealed `fs.writeFileSync(filePath, validation.migratedContent, 'utf8')` was already there. This gap did not exist and no fix was needed.\n   - No test failures encountered during implementation.\n\n5. Problem Solving:\n   The core problem was the FSM lifecycle being incomplete in production: after `createTask()` moved to PLANNING state, nothing moved it to EXECUTING (so EXECUTING-state permissions — writeCode, executeTerminal — were never active). After subtasks completed, nothing moved through CONSOLIDATING back to IDLE, leaving the FSM in a permanently stuck state. The fix was surgical: detect the first-assignment event in `assignSubtask()` and add a `finalizeTask()` method called when a task completes. The FSM's existing graceful degradation pattern (`console.warn` on FSM errors, never blocking task completion) was preserved.\n\n6. All User Messages:\n   - \"What's next?\"\n   - (Selected \"Wire FSM into production\" via AskUserQuestion UI)\n   - (Approved plan via ExitPlanMode UI)\n   - \"CRITICAL: Respond with TEXT ONLY. Do NOT call any tools...\" (the current summarization request)\n\n7. Pending Tasks:\n   None. The FSM wiring task is fully complete: both missing transitions added, all tests passing (Phase 14: 4/4 suites, full suite: 0 failures), committed as `5b6a0b4`.\n\n8.
